# Near-miss token import fixture — shipper (helper, not a standalone test)

Ships a file at a specific directory depth so the sibling `importer.md`
fixture can demonstrate a token import that names the same token and
filename but a DIFFERENT directory — a corpus-internal inconsistency, not an
external reference.

## Files

- `{pages-ui}/home/HomePage.vue`

**File:** `{pages-ui}/home/HomePage.vue`

```vue
<template>
  <div>home</div>
</template>
```
